title: Project index
body: Quick links for reviewing the reusable starter, section library, and development workspaces while the dev server is running.

links.label: Section library
links.description: Browse the current reusable section collection.

links.label: Pagebuilder
links.description: Compose, swap, and review page section recipes.

links.label: Content Editor
links.description: Map page copy and image fields into editable content forms.

links.label: Style guide
links.description: Review shared visual tokens and section defaults.

links.label: Styleguide sample page
links.description: Review the live HVAC example page correlated with Style Guide tokens.

links.label: Staged Pages
links.description: Review baked pages that are eligible to become public pages.

links.label: Dashboard
links.description: Lead dashboard route for authenticated workflows.
